evals.prompt: Define what we need to build for a 'recently viewed items' sidebar on the product page
evals.expected_outcome: Claude brainstorms deliverables (sidebar UI, persistence, click-tracking), asks 2-3 clarifying questions (how many items, anonymous users?), decides NOT to invoke contexthub:converge (no contested tradeoff), writes a spec to docs/carefully-crafted-plugins/forge/spec/.

assertions.name: clarifying_questions_asked
assertions.description: Claude asks >=2 clarifying questions before writing the spec

assertions.name: no_converge
assertions.description: contexthub:converge is NOT invoked (no contested tradeoff)

assertions.name: spec_structure
assertions.description: spec includes Goal, Deliverables, Non-goals, Edge cases, Success criteria, Open questions sections

evals.prompt: Should we move auth from session cookies to JWTs?
evals.expected_outcome: Claude recognizes this as a contested design call, invokes /contexthub:converge to get three perspectives, incorporates the synthesis into the spec, cites which parts came from the debate.

assertions.name: converge_invoked
assertions.description: contexthub:converge is invoked for this contested design choice

assertions.name: spec_cites_converge
assertions.description: spec body cites which conclusions came from the debate
